zh.Brereton, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布雷雷頓
zh.Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Engl: 英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德
zh.Weston upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon de Weston於1136年出生在英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德時，他的父親Robert de Weston23歲，母親Sibyl de Landa21歲。他於1161年與Agnes de Brereton在英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1214年10月16日在英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon de Weston于1136年出生在英国斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德时，他的父亲Robert de Weston23岁，母亲Sibyl de Landa21岁。他于1161年与Agnes de Brereton在英国斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1214年10月16日在英国斯塔福爾韋斯頓享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éamann
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon de Weston was born in 1136, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, his father, Robert de Weston, was 23 and his mother, Sibyl de Landa, was 21. He married Agnes de Brereton in 1161, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 16 October 1214, in Weston, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon de Weston est né en 1136, à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Weston, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sibyl de Landa, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Brereton en 1161, à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1214, à Weston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon de Weston 1136 in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Weston 23 und seine Mutter Sibyl de Landa 21. Er hat 1161 in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England Agnes de Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1214 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Weston, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon de Weston è nato il nel 1136 nel Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Weston, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl de Landa, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Brereton nel 1161, nel Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 16 ottobre 1214, nel Weston, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.Weston, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン
ja.lifeSummary: Hamon de Westonが1136年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドで生まれた時，父Robert de Westonは23歳，母Sibyl de Landaは21歳であった。1161年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドでAgnes de Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1214年10月16日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon de Weston(이)가 1136년 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Weston(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl de Landa(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1161년 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 Agnes de Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1214년 10월 16일 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon de Weston nasceu em 1136, em Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Weston, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl de Landa, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Brereton em 1161, em Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1214, em Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon de Weston родился в 1136 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Weston было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Landa, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Brereton в 1161 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 16 октября 1214 г. в местности вестон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamon de Weston nació en 1136, en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Weston, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sibyl de Landa, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Agnes de Brereton en 1161, en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1214, en Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
